description: Official Lados procurement capability pack for RFQ, quotation, award recommendation, and purchase order request workflows.
guardrails: Award recommendation is advisory and must route through human review.
Supplier data belongs in Knowledge Packs, not embedded inside Procurement nodes.
Finance-owned PO creation and approval belong to Commercial Finance.

verification.manifest: verified — S5 fix: nodes.json only defined 4 of the 6 nodes manifest.json declared (issue_rfq, receive_quotation were missing); added both. New migration 0058_procurement_resource_types.sql adds rfq/quotation/po_request resource types
verification.runtime: implemented — all 6 nodes implemented; compare_quotations and recommend_award are deliberately stateless/advisory (no resource persisted — human review happens via a separate lados.human.request_approval node in the composing template)
